tool.name: tantan
tool.description: tantan gentle low-complexity intervals as content-annotated BED6
tool.command: set -o pipefail && #if str($input.ext) == 'fasta.gz' gunzip -c '$input' #else cat '$input' #end if | awk '/^>/{print;next}{print toupper(\$0)}' > in.fa && tantan in.fa | awk -f '$__tool_directory__/lc2bed.awk' | python3 '$__tool_directory__/lc_classify.py' in.fa - | LC_ALL=C sort -k1,1 -k2,2n > '$output'
tool.help: **tantan** (Martin Frith) — probabilistic "gentle" low-complexity masking, well suited to AT-rich genomes. Emitted as **BED6** with per-interval content: name = repeat-unit signature, score = purity x1000, strand = ``.``. Input is upper-cased first so masking is computed de novo.
